transcription_notes: Transcribed from the UJ 2027 Undergraduate Prospectus (publication March 2026), pages 30-95. Scope: bachelor + extended degrees and diplomas + extended diplomas across all 8 faculties (qualification_type 'degree' or 'diploma'); online programmes and the NCV/NASCA/SC(a) alternative-admission tables deferred. Subject names normalised to UniFlo's NSC list (Physical Sciences, Life Sciences, English Home/First Additional Language). 'Technical Mathematics'/'Technical Sciences' and the named-language subjects (Afrikaans/IsiZulu/Sepedi Home/First Additional Language) are used where the prospectus accepts them and must be checked against the frozen NSC list. Conditional APS (e.g. 25-with-Maths / 26-with-Maths-Lit) encoded via requirements.aps_rule; min_aps stores the Maths-route value. Subject alternatives at different levels (e.g. Maths 60% OR Maths Lit 50%) encoded via requirements.subject_rules[].options. Where Science major-combinations list a module-dependent higher level, the admission floor is encoded. BEd Senior-Phase/FET teaching-subject combinations are simplified to the core gating subjects; see notes per entry.

programmes.notes: Maths/Tech Maths route APS 25, Maths Lit route APS 26. International maths/maths-lit requirement may be waived if entrance requirements and APS are intact.
